data.body:
## Description

**What**: Remove all v2 ticket system references from plugin scripts — collapse dual-path v2/v3 conditionals to v3-only, replace tk command calls with ticket CLI equivalents, remove TK variables and TICKETS_DIR variables.
**Why**: Scripts are the active code layer; cleaning them first unblocks all other categories.
**Scope**:
- IN: validate-phase.sh (replace $TK ready/blocked with ticket list query, remove TK variable), agent-batch-lifecycle.sh (replace tk show/create/status/add-note/close with ticket equivalents, remove TK variable), classify-task.sh (remove v2 branch and _use_v3 detection, replace tk ready with ticket list), sprint-next-batch.sh (remove v2 elif branch lines 278-314, remove TICKETS_DIR variable, remove v2 load_ticket_body fallback lines 557-564), sprint-list-epics.sh (remove entire v2 else branch, remove TICKETS_DIR and TK variables), enrich-file-impact.sh (remove v2 else branch and _use_v3 detection), end-session/error-sweep.sh (replace tk create/list with ticket equivalents)
- OUT: Hooks, config, docs, CI workflows, tests (separate stories)

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, no script in plugins/dso/scripts/ or plugins/dso/skills/ contains references to the tk command, $TK variable, TICKETS_DIR variable pointing to .tickets/, or v2/v3 conditional branches
  <- Satisfies: "No references to the tk command or .tickets/ directory remain in active code"
- When this story is complete, all dual-path v2/v3 conditionals in the listed scripts are collapsed to v3-only code paths
  <- Satisfies: "All dual-path v2/v3 conditionals in scripts are collapsed to v3-only"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Reliability] tk and ticket CLIs have different argument order (tk create "<title>" -t bug vs ticket create bug "<title>") — verify each replacement
- [Reliability] validate-phase.sh phase_full() changes from human-friendly tk output to JSON ticket list output — parsing must change
- [Maintainability] sprint-next-batch.sh and sprint-list-epics.sh have large v2 branches — verify no v3 code is accidentally removed
